executive_summary: Canada is experiencing an unprecedented ransomware surge with 101 Canadian organizations compromised in the past 48 hours across all sectors, including critical infrastructure. Notable victims include Canada Goose, National Money Mart (financial services - database leaked), Eastern Townships School Board, Peterborough Public Health, and Municipality of North Perth. Separately, the Canadian Centre for Cyber Security has issued an updated advisory for three critical vulnerabilities in Cisco ASA and FTD network security devices (CVE-2025-20333, CVE-2025-20362, CVE-2025-20363) that require immediate patching. The Qilin ransomware group alone is responsible for 18 Canadian victims, followed by Play with 10 and Clop with 13.

canada_landscape.summary: Canada faces a critical ransomware crisis with 101 organizations compromised across all provinces and sectors in 48 hours. The Canadian Centre for Cyber Security (CCCS) has issued Alert AL25-012 Update 2 for critical Cisco ASA/FTD vulnerabilities requiring immediate patching. Public sector entities hit include Peterborough Public Health, Municipality of North Perth, MRC de Maskinongé, Eastern Townships School Board, and Workers Health & Safety Centre.
canada_landscape.retailers: Canada Goose (compromised by CoinbaseCartel), Active Green + Ross (compromised by Sinobi)
canada_landscape.financial: National Money Mart Company - database leaked (Everest ransomware), Morison Insurance Brokers (Sinobi), Trucash financial services (Lynx), multiple accounting firms including Pewarchuk CPA and MG Chartered Professional Accountant

report_2w.executive_summary: ShinyHunters has launched a widespread attack on Instructure's Canvas learning management system, defacing login pages and disrupting access to thousands of schools globally, including major Canadian universities. Four critical Linux kernel vulnerabilities (CVE-2026-43284, CVE-2026-43500, CVE-2026-31431) have been flagged by Canada's Cyber Centre, requiring immediate patching. NVIDIA confirmed a data breach at its GeForce NOW partner exposing user personal information, and multiple ransomware groups (Akira, Genesis, Qilin) have posted new victims. A critical cPanel vulnerability (CVE-2026-41940) also requires urgent attention from hosting providers.

canada_landscape.summary: Canadian Cyber Centre (CCCS) issued four advisories in the past two weeks, including three critical Linux kernel vulnerabilities and one addressing social engineering attacks on enterprise SaaS environments. The Canvas cyberattack by ShinyHunters has significantly impacted Canadian universities nationwide, disrupting thousands of students' access to online learning platforms. Poland's intelligence agency reported Russian cyberattacks on water treatment infrastructure, raising concerns about critical infrastructure vulnerabilities in allied nations including Canada.
